Zhixian Yang

Mailing Address:
No. 1 Duxue Road, Nansha District, Guangzhou City, Guangdong Province, P. R. China (P.C.: 511453)

My workplace:E1-4F-218

Bio

I am a first-year MPhil student studying at the HKUST Guangzhou (Hong Kong University of Science and Technology, Guangzhou Campus). Check here if you are interested in HKUST Guangzhou's RBM (Red Bird MPhil) program. My aspiration is to pursue a PhD position focusing on topics related to atmospheric modeling, computational fluid dynamics, or their applications in aerospace/unmanned aerial systems.

My supervisor is Dr. Henry Zhen Liu. Before I entered HKUST Guangzhou, I reveived my Bachelor Degree of Science in Atmospheric Sciences at Sun Yat-sen University (SYSU), where I finished my bachelor's thesis under the supervision of Dr. Maoqiu Jian.


Please feel free to contact me if you are interested in my research.
